title: ESFA Update: 15 January 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 high needs place change process   Action 2024 to 2025 Advanced learner loans performance management point 2   Information 16 to 19 in-year growth for academic year 2024 to 2025   Information 16 to 19 funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information Updated Funding higher risk organisations and subcontractors policy   Information Changes to how we make variations to funding in our ESFA Education and skills agreements and accountability agreements   Reminder Mandatory FE workforce data collection window is closing on Friday 17 January 2025   Your feedback Changes to the financial statement submissions process     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 high needs place change process   Action Academies national non-domestic rates (NNDR) new claims for 2024 to 2025 by 31 January 2025   Information 16 to 19 in-year growth for academic year 2024 to 2025   Information 16 to 19 funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information National non-domestic rates payment process for academies from Tuesday 1 April 2025   Information View national funding formula for schools service is being retired   Information Changes to how we make variations to funding in our ESFA Education and skills agreements and accountability agreements   Reminder The Procurement Act goes live on Monday 24 February   Reminder Submit your trust’s accounts return by Tuesday 28 January 2025   Events and webinars Q&A dial-in sessions – Academies chart of accounts and automation   Events and webinars Academy finance professionals January power hour – Academies accounts return   Events and webinars The Risk Protection Arrangement (RPA)   Events and webinars Buying ICT for your school webinar   Events and webinars Q&A dial-in sessions – Academies chart of accounts and automation   Events and webinars RPA members only – School trips workshop     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 high needs place change process   Information 16 to 19 in-year growth for academic year 2024 to 2025   Information 16 to 19 funding for academic year 2025 to 2026   Information National non-domestic rates payment process for local authority maintained schools from 1 April 2025   Information Thursday 9 January 2025 authority proforma tool workshop is now uploaded to the ESFA YouTube channel   Information Local authority planning calendar 2024 to 2025 (to cover the period January 2025 to March 2025)   Information Changes to how we make variations to funding in our ESFA Education and skills agreements and accountability agreements   Information View national funding formula for schools service is being retired   Reminder The Procurement Act goes live on Monday 24 February   Reminder Mandatory FE workforce data collection window is closing on Friday 17 January 2025   Events and webinars The Risk Protection Arrangement (RPA)   Events and webinars Buying ICT for your school webinar   Events and webinars RPA members only – School trips workshop    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
